why: Present search results in a consistent format for consumption by the caller

output.console: Formatted search results with entry summaries and relevance scores

success_handling.criteria: Search results are formatted into the standard output structure with entry metadata, relevance scores, and content snippets

error_handling.criteria: Unable to format results into standard output structure
error_handling.action: Return raw results without formatting, log warning

event.message: Result formatting failed, returning raw results: {error}

decisions.outcome: Knowledge search flow complete, return results to caller
Return raw results, search still considered successful
